audit_log_scope_organization_ck.name: audit_log_scope_organization_ck
audit_log_scope_organization_ck.value: ("ops"."audit_log"."scope" = 'system' and "ops"."audit_log"."organization_id" is null) or ("ops"."audit_log"."scope" = 'organization' and "ops"."audit_log"."organization_id" is not null)

background_jobs_scope_organization_ck.name: background_jobs_scope_organization_ck
background_jobs_scope_organization_ck.value: ("ops"."background_jobs"."scope" = 'system' and "ops"."background_jobs"."organization_id" is null) or ("ops"."background_jobs"."scope" = 'organization' and "ops"."background_jobs"."organization_id" is not null)

exports_available_metadata_ck.name: exports_available_metadata_ck
exports_available_metadata_ck.value: "ops"."exports"."status" <> 'available' or ("ops"."exports"."object_key" is not null and "ops"."exports"."content_sha256" is not null and "ops"."exports"."size_bytes" is not null)

invitations_acceptance_ck.name: invitations_acceptance_ck
invitations_acceptance_ck.value: "iam"."invitations"."status" <> 'accepted' or ("iam"."invitations"."accepted_by_user_id" is not null and "iam"."invitations"."accepted_at" is not null)

predictions_scope_organization_ck.name: predictions_scope_organization_ck
predictions_scope_organization_ck.value: ("model"."predictions"."scope" = 'system' and "model"."predictions"."organization_id" is null) or ("model"."predictions"."scope" = 'organization' and "model"."predictions"."organization_id" is not null)

seasons_date_range_ck.name: seasons_date_range_ck
seasons_date_range_ck.value: "sports"."seasons"."starts_on" is null or "sports"."seasons"."ends_on" is null or "sports"."seasons"."ends_on" >= "sports"."seasons"."starts_on"

session_metadata_revocation_ck.name: session_metadata_revocation_ck
session_metadata_revocation_ck.value: ("iam"."session_metadata"."revoked_at" is null and "iam"."session_metadata"."revoked_reason" is null) or ("iam"."session_metadata"."revoked_at" is not null and "iam"."session_metadata"."revoked_reason" is not null)

users_email_pair_ck.name: users_email_pair_ck
users_email_pair_ck.value: ("iam"."users"."email" is null and "iam"."users"."email_normalized" is null) or ("iam"."users"."email" is not null and "iam"."users"."email_normalized" is not null)

users_status_timestamps_ck.name: users_status_timestamps_ck
users_status_timestamps_ck.value: ("iam"."users"."status" = 'active' and "iam"."users"."disabled_at" is null and "iam"."users"."deleted_at" is null) or ("iam"."users"."status" = 'disabled' and "iam"."users"."disabled_at" is not null)
